verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Our Father knows what's best for us So why should we complain We always want the sunshine But He knows there must be rain Our Father tests us often With suffering and with sorrow He tests us, not to punish us, But to help us meet tomorrow

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God knows best, God knows best He knows what's best for you & me So trust in full surrender God knows best, God knows best Our Father knows what is best For you and me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For our Father loves His children And to Him all things are plain So He never sends us pleasure When the soul's deep need is pain So whenever we are troubled And when everything goes wrong It is just God working in us To make our spirit strong

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Trust in the Lord with all your heart, Lean not unto thine own understanding, In all thy ways acknowledge Him And He shall direct your path
